# BIM Services

> BIM Services is a technical support studio specialized in BIM coordination, modeling and construction documentation for architecture, engineering and construction teams.

Production URL: https://sdcortesa.github.io/bimservices-website/

Core positioning: BIM Delivery Intelligence.

Primary audience: architecture firms, engineering offices, contractors, developers and AEC teams that need specialized BIM production support.

Services described on the website:
- CAD to BIM
- Specialty BIM Modeling
- 3D Coordination
- Construction Documentation
- Cost & Quantity Estimation
- 4D Construction Planning

Important notes:
- This file is a secondary AI-reader aid. The canonical website HTML, metadata, robots.txt and sitemap.xml remain the primary machine-readable sources.
- Contact email, phone number, real LinkedIn profiles and validated public project case studies are not confirmed yet.
